name: Mrs Fields White Chocolate Chipper
recipeIngredient: 6 oz White Chocolate; chopped into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat together butter, sugars, egg, and vanilla until fluffy.
4. Reduce mixer speed to low, then add flour, increasing speed gradually and beating just until blended.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and chocolate pieces.
6. Drop heaping tablespoons of dough onto the prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for about 15 minutes or until edges are slightly browned and tops appear dry.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for about 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
